CustomField.description: Lookup (not Master-Detail) to VS_Patient__c: the person this appointment is for (booker may differ, see VS_Booked_By_Mobile__c). Lookup because patient retention (>=10 yr if vaccinated) and appointment retention (bookings 3 yr, Annexure C4) are different lifecycles -- a Master-Detail cascade-delete would force one lifecycle onto the other, which is unacceptable for retention (design §2.4, REQ-052). deleteConstraint=Restrict so a patient with existing appointments cannot be deleted out from under its booking history; purge is handled by VS_RetentionPurgeBatch (VS-21) per class, not by ad hoc record deletion.
CustomField.label: Patient
